---
title: "Schedule"
toc: true
toc-location: right
---

## 0900 - 1000

[Introduction and Principles of
reproducibility](materials/principles-of-reproducibility.qmd)

-   Introduction
-   Principles of reproducibility

[Introduction to R and
RStudio](materials/introduction-to-r-and-rstudio.qmd)

-   Finding your way round RStudio
-   Typing in data and plotting it

## 1000 - 1030 Break 30 mins

## 1030 – 1200

[Introduction to R and
RStudio](materials/introduction-to-r-and-rstudio.qmd) continued

-   Importing data
-   Working directories and file paths

## 1400 – 1500

[Reproduciblereports with
quarto](materials/reproducible-reports-with-quarto.qmd)

## Optional material

[Computational Analysis for
Bioscientists](https://3mmarand.github.io/comp4biosci/)
